zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Wentworth於1426年2月13日出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可內特萊斯亞德時，他的父親Roger Wentworth52歲，母親Margery Despenser29歲。他於1454年之前與Elizabeth Howard結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1482年3月22日在他的家鄉享年56歲，埋葬在英國艾可維瑟斯費爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry Wentworth于1426年2月13日出生在英国英格兰素福爾可內特萊斯亞德时，他的父亲Roger Wentworth52岁，母亲Margery Despenser29岁。他于1454年之前与Elizabeth Howard结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1482年3月22日在他的家乡享年56岁，埋葬在英国艾可維瑟斯費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Wentworth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from Wentworth in Yorkshire. The placename probably derives from the Old English personal name Wintra + Old English worth ‘enclosure’.
habitational name from Wentworth in Cambridgeshire, which has the same etymology as the placename in 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Wentworth was born on 13 February 1426, in Nettlestead, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Roger Wentworth, was 52 and his mother, Margery Despenser, was 29. He married Elizabeth Howard before 1454. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 5 daughters. He died on 22 March 1482, in his hometown, at the age of 56, and was buried in Wethersfield, Essex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry Wentworth est né le 13 février 1426, à Nettlestead, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Roger Wentworth, avait 52 ans et sa mère, Margery Despenser, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Howard avant 1454. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 22 mars 1482, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterré à Wethersfield, Essex, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry Wentworthが1426年2月13日にイギリスイギリススフォルクネットレステアドで生まれた時，父Roger Wentworthは52歳，母Margery Despenserは29歳であった。1454年以前にElizabeth Howardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1482年3月22日に故郷で56歳で死去し，イギリスエセックスウエスエルスフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Wentworth(이)가 1426년 2월 13일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 네틀레스테아드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger Wentworth(은)는 52세였고, 그의 어머니 Margery Despenser(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1454년 이전 Elizabeth Howard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1482년 3월 22일 그의 고향에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 에세스 베더스필드에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Wentworth родился 13 февраля 1426 г. в местности неттлестид, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Roger Wentworth было 52 года, а матери, которую звали Margery Despenser, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Howard перед 1454 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 5 дочерей. Он умер 22 марта 1482 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 56 лет и был похоронен в местности ветирсфиелд, эссекс, Англия.
